title: aspilia helianthoides subsp. ciliata
intro: Aspilia helianthoides subsp. ciliata, also known as African fleabane or ciliata Aspilia, is a flowering plant species within the Asteraceae family. Traditionally used in folk medicine, this plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and as a diuretic. The health benefits of Aspilia helianthoides subsp. ciliata include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of various conditions, such as urinary tract infections and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional remedies.
